project-overview.description: Load the project architecture overview for this Telegram bot.
project-overview.template: Use the relay-assistant-overview skill and AGENTS.md. Return a compact but complete map of the project: purpose, runtime flow, main modules, storage schema, external services, environment variables, common commands, and safe files to inspect first. Do not read .env or data/ unless explicitly asked.

project-debug.description: Diagnose a bug using the project's known architecture.
project-debug.template: Use AGENTS.md and the relay-assistant-overview skill first. Then diagnose the reported issue by tracing the relevant flow through bot.py, storage.py, config.py, llm.py, summarizer.py, assistant.py, image_recognizer.py, video_recognizer.py, transcriber.py, and periods.py as needed. Prefer minimal fixes and verify with compileall or targeted commands. Do not inspect .env or private data/ files unless the user explicitly asks.

project-smoke.description: Run the lightweight validation checks for this project.
project-smoke.template: Run a lightweight project smoke check. Prefer `.venv/bin/python -m compileall src` when .venv exists, otherwise `python -m compileall src`. If dependencies are installed, optionally run import checks for tg_summary_bot modules. Report commands, results, and any limitations.
